metadata.description: Official RESTForge marketplace for Claude Code: a plugin that bundles the end-to-end workflow skill together with the RESTForge MCP server.

plugins.name: restforge
plugins.description: RESTForge plugin for Claude Code. Bundles (1) a skill that guides the full RESTForge end-to-end workflow — project setup, SDF definition, schema migration, payload/endpoint generation, and runtime launcher — with grounding-first rules and destructive-operation guardrails; and (2) registration of the RESTForge MCP server (61 tools). Use for any RESTForge task: project setup, dbschema/SDF, endpoint codegen, database migration.
